meta.title: InventivAgents — Story map
meta.description: Columns = Epics (`epicId` → `specify/spec.md` §2); swimlanes = milestones. Each **user story** (`userStoryId`) appears on **exactly one card** — a US belongs to one Epic and one milestone. If a theme spans milestones, it is **split into different `US.x`** (`US.7` cockpit chat · `US.11` persisted sessions · `US.12` tool-augmented chat). **Technical tasks** (`T###`) are listed on the card (`refs`) and in the card modal — many tasks per card. Matrix: `specify/traceability.md`.

personas.label: Maintainer
personas.description: Platform engineer (onboarding, kernel, MCP loop, persisted runs)

story.iWant: to create my organization once and land in a documented, runnable cockpit + API layout
story.soThat: every subsequent user and dataset is scoped to `organization_id` and contributors share one dev/build path
definitionOfDone: Cockpit shell + register org + documented `fe-*` / Make targets; see `spec.md` §7.11 (M5a) and `005_milestone_5.md`.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a fresh clone, when I follow README, then I can register an org and run API + cockpit dev.
Given shipped tasks T033–T034–T046, when I trace in `traceability.md`, then each maps to **US.1** only.

story.iWant: to sign in and have the client resolve my role for API and UI gates
story.soThat: Owner, Admin, and User capabilities stay enforced consistently
definitionOfDone: Login + `GET /auth/whoami` with role consumed by cockpit (`005_milestone_5.md`).
acceptanceCriteria: Given valid credentials, when I log in, then the UI loads role-aware navigation.
Each technical task (**T035**, **T036**) cites **US.2** and **E-AUTH** only.

story.iWant: to register and manage managed LLM providers (URL, credentials) in my org catalog
story.soThat: agents resolve sovereign endpoints under our keys and residency choices
definitionOfDone: Cockpit list + create flows call M3 org-scoped APIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Given an admin JWT, when I create a provider, then it appears in the list for the same org only.

story.iWant: to register Skills (including MCP-backed) the org can attach to agents
story.soThat: governed tool surfaces are reusable, not one-off integrations
definitionOfDone: List + create skill in cockpit against M3.
acceptanceCriteria: Given admin, when I add a skill, then it is listed for agent configuration.

story.iWant: to define Agents (mission, persona, LLM choice, allowed skills)
definitionOfDone: List + create agent; selectable in chat.
acceptanceCriteria: Given configured agent, when User opens chat, then agent id is available for SSE completion.

story.iWant: providers, skills, and agents persisted with RLS and served through org-scoped repository and HTTP APIs
story.soThat: no tenant can read or mutate another tenant’s registry rows
definitionOfDone: M3 migrations + repositories; cockpit uses org-scoped list/create only.
acceptanceCriteria: Cross-tenant denial covered by integration tests and RLS policies per `003_milestone_3.md`.

story.iWant: to send a prompt to a configured agent and receive a streamed response in the cockpit
story.soThat: I can use sovereign agents from the browser without bespoke integrations
definitionOfDone: Cockpit calls `POST /org/agents/:id/complete/stream` (SSE) using the M4a kernel; deltas + terminal `usage`/`done` render.
acceptanceCriteria: Given agent + JWT, when I send a prompt, then deltas and terminal `usage`/`done` render.

cards.title: Last-turn usage signal in the cockpit

story.iWant: the last `usage` payload from the SSE stream surfaced in the cockpit
story.soThat: I get an immediate, read-only signal of token consumption per turn
definitionOfDone: Last non-null `usage` from SSE shown in Owner panel per `spec.md` §4; no persisted dashboards in this US (see `US.13`).
acceptanceCriteria: Given completion with usage payload, when stream ends, then panel shows token fields.

story.iWant: LLM streaming + contracts behind the cockpit (no MCP in product path)
story.soThat: cockpit and API clients share one tested kernel for single-turn completions
definitionOfDone: Phases 1–3 of `004_milestone_4.md` shipped; see `mvp-engine-validation.md`. MCP + orchestrator are `US.15` (M4b).
acceptanceCriteria: TraceID on stream; org-scoped provider resolution; integration tests green.

story.iWant: to resume prior conversations and share them with my group when policy allows
story.soThat: work with agents survives reloads and can be continued by teammates
acceptanceCriteria: Two-browser sharing smoke passes; RLS enforced per org/group.

cards.title: Owner usage dashboards on persisted metrics

story.iWant: dashboards on persisted metrics (tokens, optional cost) for my org
story.soThat: I can steer budget and governance beyond a single SSE turn
definitionOfDone: Typed client + dashboard wired to the `US.14` read API once it ships (M4b Phase 5).
acceptanceCriteria: Given metrics API, when Owner opens usage, then aggregates render without cross-tenant leakage.

story.iWant: to manage invites, groups, and membership boundaries
story.soThat: collaboration scales without breaking tenant isolation intent
definitionOfDone: Invite + groups cockpit flows with RBAC per `005_milestone_5.md`.
acceptanceCriteria: Given Owner/Admin, when I invite or edit a group, then errors never echo secrets.

story.iWant: streamed completions that may call governed tools (MCP skills) through an orchestrated path
story.soThat: configured agents can act on data and systems within the policy boundary
definitionOfDone: Ships on top of the `US.15` orchestrated kernel and `US.4` skills; covered by Phase 6 validation in `004_milestone_4.md` and the testing checkpoints (M4b).
acceptanceCriteria: Given an agent with skills attached, when I prompt it, then the cockpit streams the response and any tool steps stay within the auditable run row.

cards.title: Persisted runs and token metrics ground truth

story.iWant: execution runs and token metrics persisted with RLS, and exposed via an org-scoped read API
story.soThat: reporting reflects real, auditable multi-tenant usage and unlocks the `US.13` dashboards
definitionOfDone: Migrations + repository + read API for runs/metrics per Phase 5; `set_rls_context` on every path.
acceptanceCriteria: Integration test: org A cannot read org B execution rows; documented read API consumed by `US.13`.

story.iWant: the engine to run MCP `tools/call` in the reasoning loop, with an orchestrator service and persisted run linkage behind a documented streaming entry route
story.soThat: tool-using agents from `US.5` / `US.4` are exercised consistently across cockpit and API clients
definitionOfDone: Phases 4 + 6 of `004_milestone_4.md` integrated; entry route + env vars documented (`T031`/`T032`); pairs with `US.14` for persisted metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Optional tool path + orchestrator happy path covered by integration tests per milestone file.
